'''''Shadow''''' was a [[TIE/d "Defender" Multi-Role Starfighter/Legends|TIE Defender]] squadron associated with [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Demetrius Zaarin]]'s [[TIE Experimental Project]]. Fighters from Shadow Squadron participated in both the defense of [[Bretie Facility]] and research station [[Obsidian (XQ1 Platform)|''Obsidian'']]. However, on each occasion their intervention proved fruitless.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
